Comment.MultiLanguageText: Status: all axes enabled (mirror from MC_GroupPower.axesEnabled)
Status: error on any joint TO
Status: all 4 joint TOs report StatusWord.X5 (Homed)

Phase G (C67, 2026-05-18) — derived: axesEnabled AND axesHomed AND NOT axesError. Computed in FB_AxisCtrl REGION StatusDerived. Per HMI cycle-7.1 BackColor Q2 ACK: single Bool tag enables HMI lmpKinReady_Ubp BackColor Range "1:1" binding without multi-tag JS compute.
PLC 衍生: 运动学组就绪 (使能 AND 已回零 AND 无故障)
Status: all 4 joint TOs report StatusWord.X7 (Standstill)
Home positions per kinematic axis index (A1=J1, A2=J3, A3=J2, A4=J4). Initialized by Startup.scl.
Home mode per kinematic axis index. 7 = set actual position (no physical homing motion).
Start mode for MC_Power per axis. 1 = enable position-controlled. Initialized by Startup.scl to avoid retain-drift issues.
Stop mode for MC_Power per axis. 1 = immediate stop. Initialized by Startup.scl.
Restart mode flags for MC_GroupReset per axis.

V3.0 (2026-05-19): suction-cup GRIP command (level, TRUE while box attached). Maps to MCD signal `sScaraGrip` (SignalAdapter, Input bool, MCD reads). Driven by FB_AutoCtrl_Palletizing V3.0: latched TRUE from PICK_DESCEND.Done through PLACE_DESCEND.Done; FALSE elsewhere.
V3.0 吸盘吸气指令: 抓取期间保持TRUE

V3.0 (2026-05-19): suction-cup RELEASE command (pulse, TRUE briefly during active release). Maps to MCD signal `sScaraRelease` (SignalAdapter, Input bool, MCD reads). Driven by FB_AutoCtrl_Palletizing V3.0: pulses TRUE for lr_GripperOpenMs duration after PLACE_DESCEND.Done; FALSE elsewhere. Provides positive box-detach signal beyond just turning off vacuum.
V3.0 吸盘释放指令: 释放瞬间脉冲TRUE

AttributeList.Text: Minimal control DB for ABCDE 5-point cycle. Holds kinematic enable/home arrays + mirror status. Trimmed from v9 (palletizing/recipe/manual fields removed).
